case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. AIMEE FRANCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037767), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED SEP-11-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-13-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCIA, AIMEE , AN INDIVIDUAL
